title: mentha interrupta
intro: Mentha interrupta, also known as mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid. The health benefits of Mentha interrupta include relieving digestive issues, reducing nausea and headaches, and providing relief from stress and anxiety. Mentha interrupta can be consumed as a tea, added to herbal remedies, or used as a natural flavoring agent in various culinary and cosmetic applications.
